race.comment: NICISH (10) is still chasing a win this prep but has been threatening throughout. Happy to forgive the latest effort on a tricky track, and the rise back to 1400m looks ideal. This shapes as her big chance. CLARENCE (5) profiles similarly - always hitting the line strongly and did manage to break through three starts ago. Maps to get a lovely run from the middle draw and has the ratings to win if he brings his best. TROPICAL HOUSE (12) has attracted strong market support in both runs back without delivering. Nearing peak fitness now and her best form is certainly good enough, though the wide draw makes the task tougher. Milnes will need to be at her best. IMAMANZOR (8) was dominant here last time on a rain-affected track and gets some weight relief stepping up in grade. His record at the trip is strong and he must be taken seriously.
